title: cytisus tmoleus var. jankae
intro: Cytisus tmoleus var. jankae, also known as Jankae broom or Jankae cytisus, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family. It is a deciduous shrub native to the Mediterranean region, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cytisus tmoleus var. jankae include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting potential antiviral and antibacterial properties. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
